name: Spring Tulip Trio
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: three cheerful tulips growing side by side from the ground, each with a rounded cup-shaped bloom and long curving leaves, a small bumblebee hovering nearby, a few blades of grass at the base

name: Spring Butterfly Garden
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a large butterfly with wide patterned wings fluttering above a cluster of blooming flowers, swirling petal patterns on its wings, two thin curled antennae, a couple of buds and leaves below

name: Spring Rainbow and Clouds
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a big arching rainbow stretching across the sky with a fluffy rounded cloud at each end, a few small raindrops falling beneath, a smiling sun peeking from one corner

name: Spring Baby Chick
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a fluffy round baby chick standing in fresh grass, big happy eyes, a tiny triangle beak, little wings tucked at its sides, a single flower beside it, simple and cute for young children

name: Spring Bunny with Basket
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a sweet sitting bunny with long upright ears holding a small woven basket filled with flowers and a couple of eggs, a fluffy round tail, whiskers and a gentle smile, a tuft of grass nearby

name: Spring Daffodil Close-Up
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a single large daffodil shown up close filling the page, a trumpet-shaped center ringed by six wide pointed petals, a sturdy stem with two long leaves, a couple of dewdrops on a petal

name: Spring Umbrella in the Rain
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: an open umbrella with a curved handle held upright, gentle raindrops falling all around and bouncing in small puddles below, a pair of rain boots beside it, a couple of clouds above

name: Spring Bumblebee on a Flower
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a cute chubby bumblebee with striped body and small rounded wings landing on a large open flower, big friendly eyes and a tiny smile, the flower's petals spread wide, a leaf curling beside it

name: Spring Cherry Blossom Branch
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a slender tree branch covered in delicate cherry blossoms, each five-petaled flower with a little round center, a few buds not yet open, a couple of petals drifting down and a small leaf or two

name: Spring Flower Pot
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a rounded flower pot filled with three tall flowers of different simple shapes, leaves spilling over the rim, a smiling sun above and a small bee nearby, big bold shapes easy for little hands

name: Spring Garden Scene
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a busy spring garden with rows of blooming flowers, a small watering can, a butterfly and a bee flying above, a friendly worm peeking from the soil, a fence and a bright sun in the background

name: Spring Birdhouse
subject: holidays/spring
prompt: a little wooden birdhouse hanging from a leafy branch, a round entrance hole and a tiny perch, a cheerful songbird sitting beside it with a small worm in its beak, blossoms dotting the branch
